visual_description: A man in a blue checkered shirt stands near a wooden door marked 1292, facing a man in a pink plaid shirt whose back is to the camera; the man in blue has his mouth open as if speaking while the man in pink gestures with his right hand. The scene then shifts to show the man in pink facing the man in blue in a room with a framed picture and wall sconce, continuing to gesture as they talk.
audio_description: The audio features spoken dialogue between the two men, with the man in blue speaking first and the man in pink responding.
